title: Full body waifus, AI dreams, realtime AI music, open-source Gemini Omni: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search presents a news roundup covering recent AI releases including Minimax M3, Ideogram v4, Gemma 4, Nemotron 3 Ultra, and open-source projects like Bernini, PaGeR, and Magenta Realtime. The video highlights developments across text-to-image generation, language models, music synthesis, and physical AI reasoning.
writeup: AI Search runs through a batch of recent releases, naming Minimax M3, Ideogram v4, Gemma4, and Nemotron 3 Ultra, and organizing coverage by capability: image generation, text-to-speech, music generation, world models, and agent reasoning. The roundup spans multiple vendors, including Google, Nvidia, OpenAI, and Microsoft. The takeaway is a snapshot of where these capabilities stand and which labs are shipping in each category.
